title: micromeria ellenbeckii
intro: Micromeria ellenbeckii, also known as Ellenbeck's mint or East African mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in East Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Micromeria ellenbeckii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
